title: Galaxy Superheroes
description: This addon for palladium adds new Heroes! Like a Galactus!
body:
Galaxy Superheroes is a Minecraft superhero addon for Palladium.

Right now the mod adds characters like Galactus and Vision, each with their own powers, transformations, sounds, effects, and abilities.

Current features:

Galactus power
Galactus true form
Vision power
Vision disguise ability
Energy beams
Flight
Strong attacks
Custom sounds and particles
Infinity Stone based abilities

This mod is still in development, so more heroes, villains, abilities, and improvements will be added in future updates.

Required:

Minecraft Forge 1.20.1
Palladium
Pugmeowla’s Infinity Stone Core
Satsu Iron Man Addon

Recommended:
Ad Astra
